\tzpentry{ID4709}{Reassembled Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4709 introduces Reassembled Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\nds^2_{(5)} = g_{\\mu\\nu}^{(4)}dx^\\mu dx^\\nu + e^{2\\sigma}\\left(dy + A_\\mu dx^\\mu\\right)^2\n\\end{equation}
